Bus Timings

117 Bus Schedule Sharjah to Abu Dhabi Route

November 11, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Apart from Dubai and Abu Dhabi, the UAE also has a city that has extraordinary attractions, namely Sharjah. It boasts a rich heritage with numerous museums, art galleries, and cultural centers, making it a hub for history enthusiasts and art lovers.

Traveling from Sharjah to Abu Dhabi by bus is a convenient and cost-effective option. The bus service, operated by SRTA. And you can take Bus 117 to travel from Sharjah to Abu Dhabi.

Sharjah to Abu Dhabi Bus Timings

The 117 bus operates from early morning until late at night, with frequent departures throughout the day. The first bus started at 3:45 AM and the Last bus is at 11:30 PM. For those traveling back from Abu Dhabi to Sharjah, the 117 bus also operates frequently throughout the day. The first bus departs at 05:42 AM, and the last bus is at 01:27 AM. Here is the detail of Sharjah to Abu Dhabi and Abu Dhabi to Sharjah bus timings.

From Al Jubail Bus Terminal (Sharjah) From Abu Dhabi Bus Station (Abu Dhabi)
03:45 05:42
04:30 06:27
05:15 07:12
06:00 07:57
06:45 08:42
07:30 09:27
08:15 10:12
09:00 10:57
09:45 11:42
10:30 12:27
11:15 13:12
12:00 13:57
12:45 14:42
13:30 15:27
14:15 16:12
15:00 16:57
15:45 17:42
16:30 18:27
17:30 19:27
18:30 20:27
19:30 21:27
20:30 22:27
21:30 23:27
22:30 00:27
23:30 01:27

Bus 117 Timetable

About Bus 117

The bus is equipped with modern amenities, including air-conditioning, comfortable seating, TV screens, ample legroom, and dedicated sections for families, women, and passengers with special needs.

Bus 117 also equipped with surveillance cameras, first aid kits, and are regularly maintained to ensure passenger safety.

The Route

The journey between Sharjah and Abu Dhabi on the 117 bus typically takes around 2 hours and 40 minutes, depending on traffic conditions.

Passengers can enjoy a comfortable ride with ample amenities to keep them entertained and relaxed. The bus service is reliable, with regular departures ensuring minimal waiting times.

The 117 bus follows a direct route with minimal stops to ensure a quick and efficient journey, and here is the route stops of 117 Bus.

  • Al Jubail Bus Station

  • Shahama Village
  • Abu Dhabi Central Bus Station

Read Also: 118 Bus From Al Ain to Sharjah Timings

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Journey Experience

The 117 bus route from Sharjah to Abu Dhabi offers a long yet scenic journey, passing through three fascinating cities that showcase the diversity of the UAE.

Cost and Convenience

Traveling on the 117 bus offers a cost-effective and convenient option for those commuting between Sharjah and Abu Dhabi. The fare for a one-way trip is AED 30 to 33, significantly more affordable than taking a taxi, which can cost AED 250 to 300. The buses are equipped with air-conditioning and comfortable seating, ensuring a pleasant experience for passengers. With buses running every 30 to 60 minutes, the 117 service provides a reliable, hassle-free mode of transportation across these major cities.

Conclusion

Traveling between Sharjah and Abu Dhabi has been made more accessible and affordable with the 117 bus service. And of course knowing the Sharjah to Abu Dhabi bus timing is very important before you take the journey.

Whether for daily commuting or occasional trips, this bus service offers a reliable and cost-effective solution. With hourly departures, comfortable seating, and air conditioning, passengers can enjoy a hassle-free journey between these two significant UAE cities.

Faqs

What is the fare for the 117 bus from Sharjah to Abu Dhabi?

The fare for a one-way trip on the 117 bus is 33 AED

How long does the journey take on the 117 bus from Sharjah to Abu Dhabi?

The journey typically takes around 2 hours and 45 minutes

What are the operating hours for the 117 bus?

The first bus departs at 3:45 AM and the last bus departs at 11:30 PM.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 11, 2025.
